description: Centralized printer definitions for IT Aman Printer Tool. Edit this file on GitHub to push definitions to ALL devices.

naming_rules.description: Auto-increment naming rules for printer names
naming_rules.MF_pattern: BASE MF → BASE 2 MF → BASE 3 MF (e.g., Operation MF, Operation 2 MF, Operation 3 MF)
naming_rules.short_pattern: BASE → BASE2 → BASE3 (e.g., FS, FS2, FS3)
examples: Operation MF = first Operation multifunction printer
Operation 2 MF = second Operation multifunction printer
Accountant MF = first Accountant multifunction printer

instructions.add_network_printer: Add entries to the 'printers' array like: {"name": "Operation MF", "ip": "192.168.1.50", "model": "Kyocera ECOSYS", "type": "network"}
instructions.name_templates: ONLY the names approved by IT management: Operation MF, Accountant MF, FS (and their auto-incremented duplicates). Do NOT add other names.
instructions.base_names: The 3 base naming categories: Operation MF (network MF), Accountant MF (network MF), FS (thermal)
